channel.title: Hasan Portfolio Articles & Writeups
channel.description: Latest articles and writeups from Hasan' portfolio.

item.title: Hello World — MDX Post
item.description: This is a sample MDX post to demonstrate MDX support.

item.title: How to Secure Your Linux System: A Beginner's Guide
item.description: Linux is powerful but often targeted. This guide covers essentials for hardening your setup including firewall configuration, SSH security, and user management.

item.title: How Hackers Abuse Misconfigurations
item.description: Discuss common AWS S3 bucket exposures and prevention strategies. Learn how misconfigurations lead to data breaches and how to prevent them.

item.title: Python Scripts for Automating Recon
item.description: Code walkthrough for subdomain enumeration. Build your own reconnaissance tools using Python and automate your security workflows.

item.title: How to Analyze Malware Safely
item.description: Using virtual machines and tools like IDA Pro for safe malware analysis. Learn the fundamentals of reverse engineering and threat analysis.

item.title: Threat Hunting Basics
item.description: Log analysis with Splunk and ELK stack. Master the art of proactive threat hunting and learn to identify indicators of compromise.

item.title: How to Use OSINT Tools
item.description: Comprehensive guide to Maltego and Shodan for intelligence gathering. Discover how to leverage open-source intelligence for security research.
